title: arachniodes × repens
intro: Arachniodes × repens, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a type of fern that is the result of a cross between the Arachniodes aristata and Arachniodes standishii species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arachniodes × repens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
